glue.table.tableinput.Name.Docs: The table name. For Hive compatibility, this is folded to lowercase when it is stored.

glue.table.tableinput.Parameters.Docs: These key-value pairs define properties associated with the table.

glue.table.tableinput.PartitionKeys.Docs: A list of columns by which the table is partitioned. Only primitive types are supported as partition keys.  When you create a table used by Amazon Athena, and you do not specify any `partitionKeys`, you must at least set the value of `partitionKeys` to an empty list. For example:   `"PartitionKeys": []`

glue.table.tableinput.Retention.Docs: The retention time for this table.

glue.table.tableinput.StorageDescriptor.Docs: A storage descriptor containing information about the physical storage of this table.

glue.table.tableinput.TableType.Docs: The type of this table (`EXTERNAL_TABLE`, `VIRTUAL_VIEW`, etc.).

glue.table.tableinput.TargetTable.Docs: A `TableIdentifier` structure that describes a target table for resource linking.

glue.table.tableinput.ViewExpandedText.Docs: If the table is a view, the expanded text of the view; otherwise `null`.

glue.table.tableinput.ViewOriginalText.Docs: If the table is a view, the original text of the view; otherwise `null`.
